    Serialized Form

    • Package hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui

      • Class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.InputFormPanel

        class InputFormPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • addButton
            JButton addButton
            Button that fires the "add workout" event.
          • cardioCheckBox
            JCheckBox cardioCheckBox
            Checkbox marking the workout as cardio.
          • dayCombo
            JComboBox<String> dayCombo
            Drop-down for choosing the day of the week.
          • durationField
            JTextField durationField
            Input field for the workout duration in minutes.
          • formListener
            WorkoutFormListener formListener
            Listener notified when the user wants to add a workout.
          • hardButton
            JRadioButton hardButton
            Radio button for "hard" intensity.
          • lightButton
            JRadioButton lightButton
            Radio button for "light" intensity.
          • mediumButton
            JRadioButton mediumButton
            Radio button for "medium" intensity.
          • nameField
            JTextField nameField
            Input field for the exercise name.
          • noteArea
            JTextArea noteArea
            Text area for an optional note.
          • strengthCheckBox
            JCheckBox strengthCheckBox
            Checkbox marking the workout as strength.

      • Class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.MainWindow

        class MainWindow extends JFrame implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • inputPanel
            InputFormPanel inputPanel
            Left View: the input form.
          • listPanel
            WorkoutListPanel listPanel
            Right View: the list of workouts and the statistics.
          • toolBar
            WorkoutToolBar toolBar
            Top View: the file toolbar.
          • workoutLog
            WorkoutLog workoutLog
            The workout log that holds all workout data (the model).

      • Class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutFormEvent

        class WorkoutFormEvent extends EventObject implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • cardio
            boolean cardio
            Whether the "Cardio" box was checked.
          • day
            String day
            Day of the week chosen in the drop-down.
          • duration
            String duration
            Duration as raw text — parsed to a number later by the controller.
          • exerciseName
            String exerciseName
            Exercise name exactly as typed by the user.
          • intensity
            Intensity intensity
            Intensity level chosen with the radio buttons.
          • note
            String note
            Optional note text.
          • strength
            boolean strength
            Whether the "Strength" box was checked.

      • Class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutListPanel

        class WorkoutListPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • cardioCountLabel
            JLabel cardioCountLabel
            Label showing the number of cardio workouts.
          • deleteButton
            JButton deleteButton
            Button that requests deletion of the selected workout.
          • listListener
            WorkoutListListener listListener
            Listener notified when the user wants to delete a workout.
          • listModel
            DefaultListModel<String> listModel
            Model backing the workout list (holds the displayed lines).
          • strengthCountLabel
            JLabel strengthCountLabel
            Label showing the number of strength workouts.
          • totalCountLabel
            JLabel totalCountLabel
            Label showing the total number of workouts.
          • totalMinutesLabel
            JLabel totalMinutesLabel
            Label showing the total minutes across all workouts.
          • workoutList
            JList<String> workoutList
            List component showing all logged workouts.

      • Class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutToolBar

        class WorkoutToolBar extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • exportButton
            JButton exportButton
            Button requesting a text export.
          • loadButton
            JButton loadButton
            Button requesting a load.
          • saveButton
            JButton saveButton
            Button requesting a save.
          • toolBarListener
            ToolBarListener toolBarListener
            Listener notified about toolbar commands.

    • Package hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic

      • Exception Class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.InvalidInputException

        class InvalidInputException extends Exception implements Serializable

    • Package hr.unizd.workoutlog.model

      • Class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout

        class Workout extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • cardio
            boolean cardio
            True if this workout includes a cardio component.
          • dayOfWeek
            String dayOfWeek
            Day of the week when the workout took place (e.g. "Monday").
          • durationMinutes
            int durationMinutes
            Duration of the workout in minutes.
          • exerciseName
            String exerciseName
            Name of the exercise (e.g. "Running", "Push-ups").
          • intensity
            Intensity intensity
            Intensity level of the workout.
          • note
            String note
            Optional free-text note about the workout.
          • strength
            boolean strength
            True if this workout includes a strength component.
